ticket.subject: Welcome to Shopify Partner PluginHive! We’re here to help you save both time and money
ticket.raw_subject: Welcome to Shopify Partner PluginHive! We’re here to help you save both time and money
ticket.description:
Hello Eric,

 Greeting from Shopify Partner PluginHive!

 Thank you for installing our Shopify App - **“PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label App”** on zasnob.myshopify.com

 Our team would like to assist you with the complete app onboarding.

 We request you let us know a suitable time for the onboarding session, which will not take more than 10 mins. Feel free to reply to this email (or) share your contact number, we will get in touch with you.

 You can also refer our documentation to set up the app and start shipping - click here to know more

 Looking forward to hearing from you.

 Thanks and Regards,
 Team PluginHive
https://www.pluginhive.com/about/#team

comments.body:
Hello Eric,

Good day!

This is Sagar from the PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label app. Thank you for installing our solution.

We’d be happy to schedule a **free onboarding call** over Zoom screen-share to assist you with setting up and configuring the app as per your needs.

Please respond to this email so we can arrange a convenient time for the call. (or) You can also book a slot for the call according to your availability using this link - **[****Click Here****]**

Thank you, and we look forward to your response.

Best regards,
Sagar K S
PluginHive

**To:** Eric Spata <Eric@valeospizza.com>
**Subject:** Your Booking request at is confirmed April 8, 2026 09:30 am


# We have received your appointment April 8, 2026 09:30 am

Hi Eric Spata,

We’re checking in with you about your upcoming appointment on April 8, 2026 09:30 am with PluginHive Support Agent.
Our team is looking forward to seeing you soon!

As always, we want to give you the best customer support.
If you want to reschedule or discuss anything before the upcoming appointment, feel free to reach out to support@pluginhive.com.

We’ll get back to you as soon as possible.

**Appointment Highlights**

- All appointments are scheduled for a max. of 30 mins
- Our support agent will share the link with you prior to the appointment
- Kindly join within 5-10 mins of the appointment time to avoid cancellation
**Appointment Details**

- **Date & Time** - April 8, 2026 09:30 am
- **Timezone** - America/Chicago -05:00
**Customer Details**
Eric Spata

Site URL - zasnob.myshopify.com



Thanks & Regards,
Team PluginHive | PluginHive Support
